seoTitle: How to Send a Campaign in Brevo Easily (2026)
metaDescription: A complete walkthrough for building and sending a Brevo email campaign, from sender setup and recipient targeting to design and scheduling.
intro: Launching a marketing campaign in Brevo means pulling together several pieces: your sender identity, target audience, subject line, and design, all before you hit send. This guide walks through the full campaign wizard from start to finish, so first-time users can confidently move from a blank canvas to a scheduled broadcast. It's aimed at anyone sending a regular promotional or newsletter email.

steps.heading: Create the campaign
steps.body: Click Campaigns in the sidebar, select Create campaign, choose the regular Email channel, and give your campaign an internal tracking name.

steps.heading: Set your sender and recipients
steps.body: Click Select sender to choose your authenticated brand email, then click Add recipients to choose which subscriber lists will receive the campaign.

steps.heading: Write your subject line
steps.body: Add an engaging subject line and preview text to boost your open rates before moving to design.

steps.heading: Build the email design
steps.body: Click Start designing to open the visual canvas, then drag layout blocks, images, and call-to-action links onto your template.

steps.heading: Test and schedule
steps.body: Send a test email to check formatting, review the mobile preview, then click Schedule to send immediately or queue it for a future time.

faq.question: Do I need a verified sender email to send a campaign?
faq.answer: Yes, you must select an authenticated sender profile to maximize inbox placement and avoid delivery issues.

faq.question: Can I schedule a campaign for later instead of sending immediately?
faq.answer: Yes, the final Schedule step lets you choose between sending right away or queuing the campaign for a specific future date and time.

faq.question: How do I check my campaign before it goes out?
faq.answer: Use the Send a test button to deliver a preview to your own inbox and check formatting before scheduling the real send.

faq.question: Can I exclude certain contacts from a campaign?
faq.answer: Yes, the recipient selection step lets you apply exclusion lists alongside your main target audience to protect specific segments.
